name: Ken Burns FFmpeg Renderer
description: Command-line video generation from still images using Ken Burns zoom-pan effect. Chains ffmpeg with zoompan filter for cinematic image→video conversion. Supports audio padding, batch rendering, and clip concatenation. Uses ffmpeg-static for cross-platform binary support.

input.name: audioPad
input.description: Optional audio file path for voiceover/BGM

author: Tiranyx
